message:
fix(core,vdbe,parser): persistence layer, physical merge robustness, and behavioral quirk coverage

Persistence Layer (compat_persist):
- Expand the compatibility persistence layer with additional SQLite
  page format handling, header validation, and overflow chain traversal
  for correct cross-version database file support

Connection Improvements:
- Refine CTE materialization and cleanup ordering to handle nested
  WITH clauses and error recovery more gracefully
- Improve integrity check output formatting

VDBE Codegen & Engine:
- Fix register allocation edge case in aggregate window function codegen
- Improve SorterInsert collation propagation for compound SELECT with
  mixed collation columns

Parser:
- Handle edge case in INSERT column-list parsing when VALUES keyword
  appears in unexpected position
- Semantic analysis: refine expression type inference for CASE expressions

Physical Merge (MVCC):
- Restructure page merge logic to handle overflow pages and freelist
  entries correctly during compaction, preventing page leaks when
  interior nodes reference overflow chains

VFS Memory:
- Fix SHM region size calculation rounding for non-power-of-two pages

Record Parsing:
- Additional overflow guard in serial type length calculation

Test Coverage:
- Expand behavioral quirk suite with new edge case scenarios
- Update differential test harness formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.5","title":"Track E: Built-ins and Extension Parity Closure","description":"Close function and extension parity gaps with executable matrix coverage, including tricky SQLite behavior quirks.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Built-in scalar/aggregate/window/date/math coverage is matrix-complete for supported surface.
2. Extension parity matrix is executable, differential, and reproducible.
3. Collation/type-affinity/quirk behavior is covered by explicit edge-case tests.
Child quality gate contract:
- Every child task must satisfy the cross-cutting quality contract for unit/property tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logging schema validation, and evidence bundles.
- Epic cannot be closed while any child lacks reproducible test/log evidence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","estimated_minutes":1200,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:51:47.541787532Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:12:30.580446627Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["extensions","functions","parity-cert","track-e"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","title":"E1: Built-in function parity matrix (scalar/agg/window/date/math)","description":"Produce exhaustive built-in function parity matrix with oracle comparisons, including NULL/type coercion/overflow and collation interactions.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Function matrix has explicit feature ids and coverage links. 2) Differential pass/fail is recorded per function variant. 3) Unsupported variants are explicitly documented.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Implemented a machine-readable built-in function parity matrix in crates/fsqlite-harness/src/builtin_function_parity_matrix.rs and expanded crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_2yqp6_5_1_function_parity_matrix.rs with likely()/unlikely(), random/randomblob contracts, stateful meta-function parity, and window-function differential coverage. The canonical matrix now records documented failing differential variants for first_value() running-frame retention, nth_value() full-frame positional stability, and cume_dist() peer-group handling instead of asserting false green parity. Verification: rch exec -- cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_2yqp6_5_1_function_parity_matrix passed remotely on 2026-03-07; rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets also passed remotely. Broader verification remains partially blocked by unrelated worktree churn in crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs: cargo fmt --check reports pre-existing formatting drift there, and one remote cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib builtin_function_parity_matrix plus one remote cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings run failed on unrelated type errors at connection.rs:11065 and :11741/:11742 from a conflicting snapshot. Agent Mail coordination remains effectively blocked: HTTP health is ready and roster reads work, but writes were unstable; after repeated database-lock failures, one register call returned AzureSwan, yet subsequent inbox/list/send operations could not resolve that identity, so intro/acks could not be completed reliably in this session.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":420,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:21.505126985Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-07T06:23:04.992486065Z","closed_at":"2026-03-07T06:23:04.992465056Z","close_reason":"Implemented canonical built-in parity matrix and differential coverage; documented current window gaps explicitly","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["functions","parity-cert","track-e"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.5.2","title":"E2: Extension parity matrix execution (FTS/RTREE/JSON/SESSION/ICU/MISC)","description":"Turn extension parity matrix into executable deterministic differential suites with reproducible fixtures and environment constraints.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Each extension has deterministic conformance suite. 2) Feature-gated behavior is tested for enabled/disabled modes. 3) Results are traceable to ledger ids.

- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":420,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:25.301478632Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:12:38.358109235Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["extensions","parity-cert","track-e"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

4) Quirk scenarios are mapped to corpus scenario IDs and certificate feature IDs so they gate final parity certification.

- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Implemented crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_2yqp6_5_3_behavioral_quirk_suite.rs and scripts/verify_bd_2yqp6_5_3_behavioral_quirks.sh. Added corpus-backed + inline quirk scenarios for affinity, NOCASE/RTRIM collation, NULL/UNIQUE semantics, sum-vs-total overflow, mul/div overflow promotion, machine-readable artifact emission, and minimal repro SQL generation. Verification attempt: bash scripts/verify_bd_2yqp6_5_3_behavioral_quirks.sh -> rch exec cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_2yqp6_5_3_behavioral_quirk_suite -- --nocapture. Blocked by unrelated existing compile errors in crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs at ~9339 (E0277: ? in filter_map closure) and ~11812 (E0505: drop(schema) while borrowed). Local validation: bash -n verifier script passed; rustfmt parsing on the new test file passed before aligning top-of-file formatting to match cargo fmt style. Remote cargo fmt --check also reports unrelated workspace drift outside this bead.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":300,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:28.905086125Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-07T06:43:21.149979491Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","quirks","track-e"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.3","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.5.4","title":"E4: Extension/runtime wiring conformance in connection path","description":"Ensure extension crates and runtime registration path in connection/executor match parity matrix expectations, with no silent feature drop.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Runtime extension registration is explicitly tested. 2) Missing wiring causes CI failure. 3) Extension behavior is documented with supported-state tags.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"Extension/runtime wiring evidence (2026-02-26):
- Connection path currently rejects CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE modules other than fts5 at crates/fsqlite-core/src/connection.rs:3823.
- Extension crates do not show raw TODO/unimplemented markers, so main parity risk is runtime reachability/wiring rather than missing files.

Action focus for E4:
- Validate module registration and execution routing for fts3/fts5/rtree/json/session/icu/misc in connection/executor path.
- Add CI guard that fails if extension crate exists but connection/runtime path cannot register/dispatch it.

Rationale: silent runtime feature drop undermines extension parity claims even when crate code exists.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":300,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:32.162913660Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:32:49.464535159Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","track-e","wiring"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.4","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.6","title":"Track F: Concurrency and Durability Parity Verification","description":"Provide high-confidence parity for concurrency and durability semantics under adversarial schedules, crash/fault injection, and multi-process scenarios.","acceptance_criteria":"1. SSI/MVCC anomaly suites prove serializable behavior (or documented divergence where explicitly out-of-scope).
2. Busy/retry/error semantics are verified against oracle behavior.
3. Crash recovery and corruption handling achieve deterministic replayable outcomes.
4. Multi-process coordination behavior is covered by deterministic tests.
Child quality gate contract:
- Every child task must satisfy the cross-cutting quality contract for unit/property tests, deterministic e2e replay, structured logging schema validation, and evidence bundles.
- Epic cannot be closed while any child lacks reproducible test/log evidence.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","estimated_minutes":1500,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:51:53.268912422Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-26T07:42:20.315843561Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["mvcc","parity-cert","recovery","ssi","track-f"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2yqp6.6.1","title":"F1: SSI serialization anomaly differential suite","description":"Build deterministic concurrent-writer scenarios with serialization checker and oracle comparison for conflict/abort behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"1) No false-accept of non-serializable schedules in supported mode. 2) Abort/error semantics are measured and documented. 3) Replay artifacts include scheduler seed and trace ids.
Cross-cutting quality contract (mandatory):
- Comprehensive unit and property tests covering happy-path, boundary, adversarial, and error conditions with deterministic fixtures and fixed seeds.
- Deterministic e2e scenario scripts with one-command replay instructions and artifact bundle capture.
- Structured logging and metrics with `trace_id`, `run_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, timing fields, outcome, and first-failure diagnostics; CI must validate schema conformance.
- Evidence bundle links in bead notes: executed commands, artifact hashes, and explicit pass/fail summary.","notes":"2026-03-05 SilverBison: completed deterministic SSI serialization-anomaly differential suite in crates/fsqlite-e2e/tests/bd_2yqp6_6_1_ssi_serialization_anomaly_differential.rs with fixed-seed scheduler, cycle checker, fsqlite vs sqlite3 (rusqlite) oracle compare, structured SCENARIO_OUTCOME JSON (trace_id/run_id/scenario_id/seed/timing/outcome), schema validation, and replay command emission. Validation evidence (rch-offloaded): (1) cargo test -p fsqlite-e2e --test bd_2yqp6_6_1_ssi_serialization_anomaly_differential --no-run PASS; (2) cargo test -p fsqlite-e2e --test bd_2yqp6_6_1_ssi_serialization_anomaly_differential -- --nocapture --test-threads=1 PASS (3 tests); (3) cargo check --workspace --all-targets PASS; (4) cargo fmt --check PASS; (5) cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings blocked by unrelated pre-existing dead-code in crates/fsqlite-mvcc/src/write_coordinator.rs (validate_fcw_set/update_commit_index). Artifact run emitted hash: artifacts/bd-2yqp6.6.1/outcome.json sha256=ff6b4f66bb95ae3e82f2005de99f62b9e4f6bc9f111ad1201f6cc53eb945f3a8.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":420,"created_at":"2026-02-26T06:53:34.927688665Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:15:43.429630228Z","closed_at":"2026-03-05T18:15:43.429546100Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["parity-cert","ssi","track-f"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2yqp6.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-2yqp6.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T22:57:55Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
